* What was changed?
* Why was it changed?
* What problem does it solve?

## Type of Change

Please mark the relevant option:

* [ ] Bug fix
* [ ] New feature
* [ ] Documentation update
* [ ] CI/CD change

## Checklist

Before submitting this pull request, please confirm:

* [ ] My code follows the repository structure
* [ ] I did not commit build artifacts
* [ ] Documentation has been updated if necessary
* [ ] CI pipeline passes
* [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
* [ ] Pull request is focused on a single change
